mismatches.Public_Remarks: Welcome to 864 West College Rd in Alliance! Located on a quiet road and walking distance to Mount Union, this home is ready for new owners! This 3 bedroom home features beautiful natural woodwork and two fully remodeled full bathrooms. Upon arriving, you'll notice the covered front porch, perfect for enjoying your morning coffee. Inside, you'll love the flow of the living room, dining room and into the den area that could be used as an office or extra sitting space. The kitchen offers a cozy breakfast nook, overlooking the fenced in backyard. Upstairs, the spacious bedrooms offer cedar closets and an updated full bath, along with built in storage in the hall. In the basement, you'll find the second, updated full bath. Updates include partial window replacement 2024, furnace installed roughly 2014, and roof approximately 13 years old to name a few. Text or call today to schedule your showing!

WOW! This stunning 1,722 sq ft ranch with an additional 1,500 sq ft of beautifully finished lower level offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and incredible entertaining space. The open-concept kitchen flows seamlessly into the cozy living room with a gas fireplace, creating a warm and inviting gathering area. Step outside to enjoy the composite deck overlooking a brick patio, firepit, and vinyl-fenced backyard—perfect for relaxing evenings or hosting friends and family. The spacious master suite provides a private retreat with a soaking tub, large walk-in closet, and private bath. Two additional bedrooms and a full bath complete the main level. The finished lower level truly steals the show with 8-foot ceilings, a spectacular 16-foot oak wet bar, large rec room, additional huge workout room, half bath, and generous storage space—an entertainer’s dream! Additional updates include a brand new central A/C (2025) and tankless water heater (2024) for added comfort and efficiency. Built in 2000 and beautifully maintained, this home offers over 3,200 sq ft of finished living space and is ready to impress from the moment you walk in.

Charming remodeled 3-bed, 1.5-bath bungalow! This move-in-ready home features a bright, open layout with updated flooring, fresh paint, and modern finishes throughout. The updated kitchen offers partially updated cabinetry and countertops, while both bathrooms have been thoughtfully refreshed. Enjoy comfortable living spaces and a convenient half bath on the main level. Situated close to shopping, dining, parks, and schools — this home combines classic charm with contemporary updates!

Attention Investors! Incredible opportunity to purchase 4 homes, available individually or as a package deal! All properties are currently vacant and in need of some minor repairs/TLC—perfect for adding value. Several homes feature updated windows, some newer mechanicals, and solid bones throughout. The owner is highly motivated to sell, so don’t miss out—bring your offers! For more details or to schedule a showing, call anytime. Addresses are: 234 Rosenbury St, 134 11th St Alliance, 228 W Oxford.

Located near downtown Canton, public transit lines, and major roads, it offers easy access for commuting and convenience to city amenities. With desirable features and long-term value, this home is ready to generate consistent income for your portfolio. Call today to schedule your showing!

mismatches.Public_Remarks: You are invited to view this remodeled home that offers both the Old Classic Charm with the New, on the edge of Harter Heights.  Spacious living room with decorative fireplace, formal dining room both newly carpeted.  The kitchen and upstairs bathroom has been completely gutted.  There is a bonus room for office, playroom, morning room which has been finished with a new vinyyl plank flooring.  In basement is  a clothes chute, canning room and storage room, updated electric box, softner system.  The home also includes a large covered tiled front porch, ideal for relaxing outdoors.  A detached  gargage plus room to park another car.  Many updates have been done to this home, newly painted thru out, plus sewer line a hydro-jetting service and camera verification.  Water main has been excavated and cast iron soil stack in basement has been repaired.  More details of the  work completed lby professionals available.

Charming 4-bedroom, 1.5-bath home filled with natural light and timeless character. Highlights include a cozy wood-burning fireplace, arched doorways, a spacious dining area, and French doors leading to a private fenced yard. Kitchen appliances stay. The remodeled full bath features a large closet and bonus room. The finished third floor offers a versatile fourth bedroom or game room with views of the McKinley Museum and July 4th fireworks. Major updates include mini-split and central air (2021), plus furnace, windows, hot water tank, and wood shutters (2020). Enjoy relaxing on the full covered front porch. Prime location just steps from the McKinley Memorial, Museum, Monument Park, trails, and Stadium Park, and minutes from the Hall of Fame, I-77, hospitals, and restaurants.

Move-in ready 3-bedroom, two-story home situated in historic Canton Ohio. This spacious home has been totally updated with fresh paint, all new LVT flooring and carpet throughout, new windows, updated kitchen with Stainless Steel range, dishwasher and refrigerator, new vanity, shower and toilets in both bathrooms. The main level features a huge living room, dining room, dinette and kitchen.  Off of the dining room is a new sliding glass door to the private fenced in backyard with patio. Also, the front porch offers a private setting to enjoy those upcoming spring and summer days and feel the breeze and take in views of the neighborhood. The second floor offers 3 bedrooms and a large renovated full bathroom. And finally, the basement is partially finished with a full bathroom, laundry hook up, plenty of storage and glass block windows. The location is convenient to schools, the hospital, highways, and shopping. This property is ideal for an owner-occupant or an investor looking for a turnkey opportunity. The home was just recently rented for $1,200 per month with the tenant paying all utilities, offering immediate rental income potential. Property backs up to Clarendon Elementary School and is between 4th Ave and Crown Pl NW. Schedule your showing today!

Charming colonial located in historic Market Heights, full of character and timeless appeal. From the moment you step inside, you’ll appreciate the warm, inviting hardwood floors and the abundance of natural light that fills the home, creating a bright and welcoming atmosphere throughout. This home offers approx 2,500 sq ft including lower level rec space along with spacious bedrooms and comfortable living areas that blend classic charm with everyday functionality. The passthrough garage opens directly to your own private backyard sanctuary, a peaceful escape that is fully fenced for added privacy. Step out onto the large deck, perfect for entertaining guests, hosting summer cookouts, or simply relaxing and enjoying the serene setting. The backyard also features a detached garage storage shed, providing excellent space for hobbies, a workshop, or additional storage. Downstairs, the basement offers bonus recreation space, ideal for a game room, home gym, or additional living area. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, and everyday amenities, this charming home offers the perfect blend of character, comfort, and convenience in one of the area’s most beloved historic neighborhoods. Don’t miss your chance to experience all the warmth and charm this Market Heights gem has to offer.

This beautifully maintained and lovingly cared for home is move in ready!  What an adorable floor plan!  Spacious living room with fireplace, convenient kitchen with a good amount of cabinet space, two bedrooms and a full bath on the first floor plus a very large bedroom with plenty of closet and storage space on the second floor.  The beautiful finished lower level offers and additional 482 square feet of living space with a welcoming rec room and dining area plus a full bath, a workshop, a laundry room and a storage room.  The welcoming covered porch overlooks a lovely backyard.  So conveniently located near shopping and dining.  Call today!

Conveniently located near shopping and everyday amenities, this home offers the comfort and flexibility of first-floor living, featuring a main-level bedroom and full bathroom. An additional first-floor space provides the option for a laundry room, nursery, or home office—tailored to your needs. The updated kitchen is perfect for cooking and entertaining, while the living room showcases beautiful tile flooring throughout the  main level. Upstairs, you’ll find spacious bedrooms, ample storage, and charming built-ins that add character and functionality. The basement expands your living space and is ideal for a family room, media space, or he/she cave, complete with a second full bathroom already in place. Step outside to enjoy summer barbecues in the fenced-in backyard, offering plenty of room for kids and pets to play freely. Seller offering a 1 year home warranty with 2-10 Home Warranty. Don’t miss out on this versatile and inviting home—schedule your showing today!

The home features first-floor laundry and luxury vinyl flooring throughout the main level, providing durability and ease of maintenance. The interior includes original wood trim that reflects the home’s era and adds definition to the living spaces. The layout supports everyday living with clearly defined rooms and flexibility for common household needs. Out back, a deck with pergola overlooks a fully fenced yard, offering a contained outdoor area for pets, play, or casual use. The yard is manageable and provides separation from neighboring properties. This property presents an opportunity for buyers seeking an affordable entry point into homeownership and a manageable space without excess. Schedule your showing today!

Welcome home to this beautifully updated property that blends modern updates with everyday functionality! Step inside to find all new flooring and carpet throughout, creating a fresh, cohesive feel from top to bottom. The remodeled kitchen is sure to impress with stylish finishes and ample space to cook and entertain, while the formal dining room offers the perfect setting for gatherings. This home features two remodeled bathrooms, thoughtfully updated with today’s buyer in mind. The finished basement provides additional living space ideal for a rec room, home office, or gym—whatever fits your lifestyle. A convenient mudroom adds practicality and extra storage right off your entryway. The home also comes with a new hot water tank (2026), giving peace of mind for years to come.  Outside, enjoy a large front porch perfect for relaxing, along with a fenced-in backyard offering privacy and space for pets, play, or entertaining. The oversized one-car detached garage comes complete with an attached oversized shed, providing plenty of room for storage, tools, or hobbies. This move-in-ready home checks all the boxes—schedule your showing today!

Welcome to this beautifully updated 4 Bedroom Colonial home offering the perfect blend of classic style and modern comfort. The main level features a spacious layout perfect for everyday living and entertaining. First floor laundry is also a huge bonus! Enjoy year round relaxation in the bright four-season room filled with natural light and views of the backyard. Upstairs you will find 4 generously sized bedrooms with ample closet space. The finished basement provides additional living space ideal for a recreation room, gym or office. Updates and Improvements: NEW ROOF 2023, NEW FURNACE AND AC 2024, New Landscaping 2025, New garbage disposal 2023 and newer paint throughout. Washer and Dryer are negotiable and so is the trampoline. Please call to schedule a showing today!!!

Welcome home to this meticulously kept 3 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom log cabin-style charmer, with several features that are sure to impress both inside and out! This home is situated on over 1.5 acres, showcasing beautiful views of open fields from the covered front porch, offering a serene and private atmosphere. Upon entry, you will be greeted by a spacious living room with soaring vaulted ceilings, a wood burning stove for those cold nights in, and beautiful woodwork throughout! Kitchen offers ample cabinet space, stainless steel appliances, and tons of counter space to accommodate cooking, entertaining, and large gatherings. This home offers 1-floor living with a first floor bedroom, walk in closet, dedicated full bathroom with a claw foot tub, and first floor laundry! Upstairs showcases exquisite Brazilian hardwood floors, two more bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a spacious loft perfect for an office, library, or hunting display! Downstairs features a family room, a storage room with mechanicals, and a spacious rec room with a wet bar. Outside of the home, you have a massive 24x36 2 car garage, with plenty of space for more storage or a workshop. If that isn't enough, there is a massive pole barn, perfect for a dedicated workshop/ project area. Have a boat or other larger equipment? No problem. A smaller outbuilding/ shed behind the pole barn will have you covered. If you need even MORE areas to work or store items, there is another shed around the other side of the home. Part of the backyard is fenced, and there is a portable generator able to be hooked up as a backup for power! Upgrades include rear porch and heat pump (2019), sump pump and backup (2026), living room and kitchen flooring (2020), new shower upstairs (2024), HWT (2 years old roughly), fenced back yard a few years ago, pole barn (2020), other two outbuildings/ sheds (2021), exterior wood siding restained (2025), blacktop driveway (2024). Call today to schedule a private tour!

This is the one you’ve been waiting for! Welcome home to 4119 Paradise Street in Canton South, conveniently located with quick access to I-77. The street name couldn’t be more fitting for this private paradise on nearly 4 acres within Canton Local Schools. This home has been completely renovated from top to bottom. Exterior updates include a new metal roof, Hardie cement board siding (installed over the original brick), all new ProVia windows, exterior doors, glass block windows, and a brand-new deck. The long driveway and expanded parking area have been freshly graveled, and the 2-car detached garage features new metal siding. Inside, the transformation continues. The stunning new kitchen showcases quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and all-new cabinetry. Fresh LVT flooring, carpet, and updated fixtures run throughout the home, creating a cohesive, modern feel. Both bedrooms and the fully remodeled bathroom are conveniently located on the main level. The upstairs offers abundant storage and the potential to be finished for additional living space. The basement provides even more storage, along with a dedicated laundry area complete with washer, dryer, and utility sink. Major mechanical updates include a new furnace, AC, and water softener, giving you peace of mind for years to come. With acreage, privacy, and a truly turn-key renovation, this home really has it all. There’s nothing left to do here except move in. Call today to schedule a showing and experience this private paradise for yourself!

This charming 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath home offers unique multi-level living and plenty of character throughout. The inviting living room features beautiful bamboo flooring, adding warmth and style to the main living space. Off the main living is a bonus room that is boasting with natural light great for an office playroom or sitting area. The home’s distinctive layout creates separate levels that provide both functionality and privacy. Located in a desirable area of Jackson TWP, this property offers convenience to local amenities, schools, and shopping. Step outside to enjoy the backyard, complete with a newer above-ground pool—perfect for relaxing or entertaining during the warmer months. With its character, comfortable layout, and great location, this home is a wonderful opportunity for anyone looking for both charm and practicality.  The seller has made several updates including windows, roof, carpet and planked flooring, mini splits, plumbing, garage doors, service upgraded and more see attached update list!

Welcome to your new 3-bedroom, 2-bath home in Jackson Township—move-in ready and waiting for you to unpack and settle in! Step inside to a spacious living room, the perfect place to relax and unwind after a long day in front of the fireplace. The kitchen comes fully equipped with appliances, making meal preparation simple and convenient. Start your mornings with a cup of coffee while enjoying the view of the private, serene backyard, creating a peaceful nature setting right at home. This home offers the ease of first-floor living, featuring two bedrooms and a full bathroom on the main level. Upstairs, you’ll find a third bedroom that offers extra privacy—ideal as a primary bedroom, guest space, or bonus room. The walk-out, partially finished basement provides additional living and entertaining space and includes a half bathroom, making it perfect for gatherings, a recreation room, or a home office. After a long day, unwind in the screened-in patio overlooking the beautiful backyard, the perfect spot for quiet evenings while watching deer frequently pass through. The nearly half-acre lot offers privacy and plenty of space to create a garden, giving you the opportunity to grow and enjoy your own fruits and vegetables For added peace of mind, a 2-10 Home Warranty is included for one year. Schedule your showing today and make this charming home your own!

Welcome to this beautifully remodeled ranch style house in the sought-after Jackson Township with Jackson Local Schools. Arriving is a treat, as you have wonderful curb appeal, and a unique position on the lot, offering extra privacy. Upon entering you will instantly appreciate the abundance of natural light, with brand new flooring throughout. Equipt with two living space, you have the ability to have a more formal and/or casual sitting and entertain spaces. The second family room offers a beautiful stone gas fireplace with new gas logs, and a fresh makeover. The kitchen is a real gem, with brand new cabinets and countertops, light fixtures, and more! Convenient eat in bar present. Formal dining room. First floor laundry room is perfect for ones seeking true one floor living.  Offering three (or even four) bedrooms and three and a half bathrooms, this move-in ready home is a showstopper. All three bedrooms are generously sized. The finished lower level adds a bonus 4th bedroom, a third full bath, and additional living space. Perfect for those wanting to utilize and capitalize on all finished space. Outside, enjoy a half-acre plus lot with new landscaping, a concrete driveway, an attached two-car garage plus a detached one-car garage - offering three garages total, and a fenced area. Don’t forget the serene three-season enclosed porch—perfect for relaxing. Every detail was thoughtfully crafted—just move right in! You will not want to miss your chance on this Jewel in Jackson. Call today for your private showing. Open House Sunday, March 15th from 2pm - 4pm.

Bright and inviting family room featuring a corner electric fireplace (convertible to gas), sliding doors leading to the deck, and a fenced backyard complete with an outbuilding/shed. New carpet throughout the home adds a fresh, updated feel. The nicely sized eat-in kitchen offers a breakfast bar, appliances, and an open layout to the family room—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. A convenient main-floor laundry room with sink completes the level. Upstairs, the owner’s suite features new carpet, a walk-in closet, and a private full bath. Two additional bedrooms—also with new carpet—and another full bath provide comfortable space for family or guests. The lower level includes a partially finished rec room with new carpet, offering additional living or recreation space. Situated on a level lot in desirable Jackson Township and served by Jackson Local Schools.

Beautifully updated 3-level split in the heart of Jackson Township on a ½-acre lot with peaceful views! Brand new carpet and freshly painted throughout. Nearly all major improvements have been completed within the past 10 years, including roof, high-end ProVia siding and Provia double-hung windows, handcrafted fiberglass front door with obscure glass, Carrier furnace and A/C, and 200 AMP electric service. Additional insulation and house wrap were added throughout the home and garage, including under the siding and in the attic (R-26+). The eat-in kitchen features stunning Amish-built birch/cherry cabinetry with crown molding, built-ins, rollouts, and a lazy Susan, plus quality appliances including a newer dishwasher (2022) and refrigerator (2023). A rarity in a split-level, this home includes main floor, direct access from the garage to the kitchen! The living room offers a warm, welcoming feel with its crown molding, triple window and colonial-style muntin grilles between the glass! Upstairs includes an updated full bath, three comfortable bedrooms with brand new carpet and paint. The primary bedroom has its own private half bath. The lower level adds even more usable space—cozy family room with new carpet, a gas fireplace, custom Amish-built cabinetry storage with roll-outs and a tall space, and an additional flex room ideal for a 4th bedroom, office, workout room, or hobby space also with new carpet. The utility/laundry room includes convenient walkout access to the backyard. Enjoy outdoor living on the large screened-in covered porch and attached Trex deck with vinyl railing. A Weber Genesis natural gas grill is included—no propane refills needed, EVER! A fully vinyl-sided 12x8 shed and oversized 2.5-car garage provide excellent storage. All of this in a prime location close to Jackson schools, North Park & Amphitheater, The Strip shopping area, CAK Airport, I-77, and Route 21. A wonderful opportunity to settle into one of Jackson’s most convenient areas!

mismatches.Public_Remarks: Located on a dead-end street at the entrance to Jackson Twp's Willowdale neighborhood is where you will find this beautiful brick ranch. Just under 1200 square feet above ground, plus an additional 1000 in the finished basement, will give you plenty of living options. The kitchen has been opened up to the front living room, making it great for entertaining. Modern cabinetry, granite counters, a center island, and all appliances make the space functional and stylish. Wood-style flooring flows through the first floor, including all of the bedrooms. The owner's space has an attached half bath, while the other two bedrooms share an updated full bath with double sinks. The lower level almost doubles the living space with a large, second full bath, a rec room area, and a bonus room with a walk-in closet. Summer will be here soon, and just in time to enjoy the home's 0.46-acre lot, PLUS, upon approval, the current owner can transfer their Willowdale fishing & social membership to the new buyer. It all makes for the perfect summer of 2026! Plus, a home warranty is provided for your buyer's peace of mind! Schedule your showing today!

* We are asking for highest and best offers to be submitted by Sunday, March 15th, at 4pm. Please give the seller 24 hours to give response. Thank you!* Impressive split-level home located at 8529 Morrilton Circle in North Canton in a quiet, low-traffic Jackson Township neighborhood that offers a peaceful, rural feel while still being conveniently close to everyday amenities. Situated on a spacious .45-acre lot, the property features a fully fenced backyard, raised garden bed, storage shed, and an oversized detached two-car garage, providing plenty of space for outdoor enjoyment, storage, and hobbies. An attached two-car garage allows convenient entry directly into the home. The exterior has seen important updates including new siding, gutters, and downspouts in 2020, along with a roof installed in 2015. Inside, the flexible split-level layout offers multiple living spaces, including a lower-level living area with sliding doors leading to the backyard patio, a half bathroom, and a large laundry room with built-in storage. The main level features a spacious kitchen, dedicated dining area, and a large living room, along with another sliding door that opens to a deck overlooking the backyard, creating a great setting for relaxing or entertaining. The upper level includes three bedrooms, including the primary bedroom with direct access to the full bathroom. This well-maintained home offers a great combination of space, functionality, and outdoor living, and is priced to sell.

Welcome to 6496 Sandava, this 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom home offers the perfect blend of comfort, space, and privacy in the desirable Jackson Local School District. Lovingly cared for and beautifully maintained by its owner, the main level offers a living room, which can be used as an office or den; a family room with a cozy wood-burning fireplace, a kitchen, and a formal dining room. The new LVP floor was installed throughout most of the 1st floor (2025). The whole house was freshly painted. The eat-in kitchen featured a breakfast area, solid-surface countertops, a pantry, and SS appliances, a brand new dishwasher (2026), and a picture window to overlook the back yard - cozy and relaxing. First-floor laundry room is a plus for added convenience. Upstairs, you’ll find three spacious bedrooms, including a private primary suite, and a guest bathroom. The unfinished basement is a potential space for you to use as a workshop, play area, or entertainment space. Enjoy the fully fenced back yard (2021). Newer window for the whole house (2022). The house has been duct cleaned on (2025). Great location, Heart of Jackson township, just minutes from shopping, dining, and everyday conveniences, easy access to highway 77. This move-in-ready home combines comfort, style, and location. Don’t miss it for your own. Home warranty is provided

mismatches.Public_Remarks: Looking for your vacation home year round. Experience all the seasons from this amazing property with views for miles. The sunsets are magnificent and the privacy hard to find on this 6+ acre property in Jackson Township/Jackson Schools. This sprawling Ranch offers spacious rooms that are full of character, charm and modern amenities. Enter the front door and you are welcomed into a gracious Great Room that boasts vaulted and beamed ceilings, wall of windows, built in wet bar and an oversized floor to ceiling wood burning fireplace with brick surround. Casual Living and entertaining flows from the Kitchen/Dining rooms into the Family room that also has a beamed ceiling, many windows and another wide hearth Gas Log Fireplace with brick surround. Enjoy cooler winter days absorbing Vitamin D in your beautiful four season room that has heated tile floors, walls of windows and charming built ins. Adjacent to the Owners retreat this wing of the house is a joy to take in. The Owners bedroom offers Vaulted ceilings, another gas log fireplace, a Spa like Owners Bathroom and Walk in Closet that is a room all by itself. The split bedroom design affords privacy and plenty of sleeping space. There are 3 additional large bedrooms with 2 full bathrooms, laundry room, Library (possible 5th bedroom) and study space. Hard to believe but there is also additional living space in the Lower Level Office/Game room and 4th full bathroom. In addition the property has 3 acres that are wired for Invisible Pet Fence. So many possibilities here, you won't be disappointed. Welcome home!

Discover this hidden lakeside paradise at Willowdale Lake. Tucked away in the heart of Jackson Township, this rare waterfront retreat is your private escape in the exclusive Willowdale Lake community - a serene haven set on three connected lakes spanning 65 acres. More than just a home, it's a hidden paradise where every day feels like a getaway. Start your mornings gliding across glassy waters in a kayak, spend your afternoons boating or casting a line in the quiet coves, and end your evenings with a cool drink on the deck as the sun sets in breathtaking color across the lake, This one-of-a-kind property comes with exclusive access to resort-style amenities: a private clubhouse, sandy beach, patio pavilion, playground, and bar - perfect for family gatherings or quiet relaxation. A separate fishing lot adds even more privacy and lake frontage to enjoy. Set on a peaceful cul-de-sac, the 2,400 +/- sq ft home (including the finished lower level) is filled with natural light and panoramic lake views. The expansive master suite includes a fireplace and its own private deck, offering a front-row seat to the beauty of nature. With Jackson Schools and everyday convenience just minutes away, this home offers the best of both worlds: secluded lakeside living without sacrificing location. Ready for your personal touches, this is more than just a home - it's a lifestyle, and a rare opportunity to own slice of paradise.

This 5 bedroom/3 full bath custom home has been meticulously maintained & has so much to offer! The open floor plan features a two-story great room with a floor-to-ceiling brick fireplace & abundant windows to allow natural light to fill the space. The 1st floor primary bedroom includes two walk-in closets & an ensuite bath with 2 vanities, a jetted tub, & walk-in shower, while the additional 1st floor bedroom & full bath could be ideal for a guest suite or home office. The spacious kitchen boasts Schrock light-stained cherry cabinets, plenty of counter space, updated Maytag appliances (2023), dishwasher (2019), & stunning hardwood floors opening to the laundry room & large formal dining room, a perfect setting for entertaining. The home also features solid six-panel wood doors & crown molding throughout. The 2nd floor comprises 3 additional ample-sized bedrooms & a 3rd full bath. The finished lower level showcases an extra 1,764 sq ft, allowing for flexible living spaces such as a media room, exercise room, recreation room, & office. Outdoor amenities include a deck & patio overlooking a well-manicured wooded back yard. Numerous updates & upgrades have been made over the past nine years, including a new roof & gutter guards (2017), furnace (2016), hot water tank (2025), two sump pumps (2026), & air scrubber system + humidifier added to the furnace. Please contact the listing agent for a comprehensive list of all updates & improvements. Located on a cul-de-sac lot in a desirable neighborhood with sidewalks & streetlights, this home is conveniently close to Jackson schools, parks, shopping, & interstate access. All this plus so much more - contact us for your personal showing today!

Welcome to Emerald Estates in Jackson Township! This well-maintained, one-owner home offers 4 bedrooms and 2.5 baths with a functional layout designed for everyday living and entertaining. The main level features a spacious family room with gas fireplace, formal dining room, and a first-floor office perfect for working from home. The kitchen includes a large breakfast island and overlooks the bright morning room, creating an open and inviting space for gatherings. Appliances are updated and the home is complete with washer and dryer. The partially finished basement provides additional living space with a large rec room plus a separate media or gaming area, offering flexibility for hobbies, entertaining, or relaxation. Situated on a large lot with a deck ideal for outdoor entertaining. Updated mechanicals provide peace of mind. Located in the desirable Emerald Estates community with access to a community pool and clubhouse. Move-in ready and waiting for its next owner!

Move-in ready ranch on a beautiful 1-acre lot in Lake School District! This bright and inviting home offers an open feel with natural light throughout and thoughtful updates that make it easy to move right in. The welcoming great room features arched doorways and large windows, creating a warm and airy living space perfect for everyday living or entertaining. The updated eat-in kitchen includes white cabinetry, subway tile backsplash, modern lighting, and a large pantry for extra storage. Just off the kitchen you’ll find two comfortable bedrooms, a full bath, and an oversized linen closet. Important updates provide peace of mind, including a new mound septic system installed in 2023 and a waterproofed basement with sump pump installed in 2025. Step outside to enjoy the covered back porch and patio, ideal for relaxing evenings enjoying your private acre of outdoor space. The property is completed by a 2-car garage with additional storage. Homes with an acre of land, updates, and this location in Lake Schools don’t come along often! Schedule your private showing today.

Welcome to this beautifully maintained home in highly desirable Lake Township, located in a top-rated North Canton school district, set on over 2.5 private acres with scenic country views. Built in 1996 and offering over 2600 square feet, this property combines space, privacy, and thoughtful updates throughout. The main level features convenient first-floor laundry and a functional layout designed for everyday living. The walkout lower level opens to a stamped concrete patio, creating an ideal space for entertaining or relaxing while taking in the peaceful surroundings. Car enthusiasts, hobbyists, and anyone needing extra storage will appreciate the attached three-car garage plus a detached 36 x 24 garage with its own driveway and  endless potential for additional vehicles, equipment, or workshop space. Outdoor amenities include a large concrete pad perfect for a basketball court or endless games and a private lot that offers both open space and beautiful views. Extensive updates completed in 2025 provide peace of mind for the next owner. Major improvements include a new furnace, central air, roof, water heater, ProVia windows, water softener, reverse osmosis system, kitchen door to deck, and professionally cleaned ductwork. All major mechanicals and big-ticket items have been addressed.

Tucked at the heart of a cul-de-sac in the desirable St. Ives community, this freestanding condo offers exceptional privacy with peaceful wooded views from the three-season room and rear patio. The main level features an eat-in kitchen with granite countertops, a spacious first-floor laundry, and a light-filled great room with fireplace and newly replaced skylight. With three bedrooms and three full baths-including a partially finished basement with its own full bath-there's plenty of space for guests or flexible living. Furnace 2021, A/C 2022 and hot water tank 2025 add peace of mind.

Nestled on a generous .46-acre lot in Uniontown, this well-cared-for split-level home combines space, character, and everyday functionality in a desirable Lake Township setting. Offering 3 bedrooms and 2 full baths, the home welcomes you with a foyer entry, hardwood floors, and a thoughtful layout designed for comfortable living. The main level features a bright living room and an eat-in kitchen with ceramic tile flooring, breakfast bar seating, stainless steel appliances, and sliding doors leading to the covered back patio for easy indoor-outdoor living. The lower-level family room is full of charm with its dramatic stone wall and decorative fireplace, plus an adjoining office/flex space, mudroom, and full bath with shower—ideal for guests, hobbies, or working from home. Upstairs, the primary bedroom includes two closets, with two additional bedrooms and an complete remodeled full bathroom by Hartville Hardware Store featuring a beautifully finished tub/shower surround and sliding glass doors. The unfinished basement adds laundry space and room for storage. Outside, enjoy the wraparound driveway, additional rear parking, covered patio, and expansive backyard. Solid, spacious, and full of potential, this home is ready for its next chapter.

This all-brick ranch in Louisville offers over 2,000 square feet of living space and room for everyone! Situated on a corner lot near schools and just minutes from downtown restaurants, shops, parks and the walking path. The location is hard to beat! Step inside to a spacious 20x13 living room with LVT flooring and plenty of natural light. The kitchen features granite countertops, generous cabinet space, and a window overlooking the yard. A pocket door leads to the mudroom and first-floor laundry area just off the garage for added convenience. The open dining room has glass sliding doors leading to the cement patio out back.  Yard is fully fenced with white vinyl fencing and there is a large storage shed—perfect space for pets, children, gardening, or simply enjoying your own private outdoor area. Three bedrooms and a full bath with granite vanity and dual sinks are located on the main level. The finished lower level expands the living space with a cozy family room featuring a gas fireplace, wood beam ceiling, built-in shelving, and an impressive bar with seating for ten—ideal for gatherings and game days. A fourth bedroom, second full bath with tile shower, and plenty of storage complete the basement. Updated vinyl windows (2015) and glass block windows in garage and basement add efficiency and peace of mind. This is a home that truly needs to be experienced in person to appreciate the space!

Some things to know about the home. The home is essentially ready to move into. It will need window treatments such as rods and drapes. New owners may want to consider area rugs in areas where bare feet may be uncomfortable on the new vinyl strip floors. Water heater has not been tested. Hot water wasn’t needed during the rehab. Gas company will check the water heater if asked. Furnace works well so gas lines are okay. Sump pump wasn’t tested. This home has been entirely painted, all floor covering removed and replaced with new vinyl strip, plumbing and electrical checked and repaired as needed, ceiling fans replaced, and some carpentry work as needed. It is priced in accordance with others of similar size. This home was built in 2005 so plumbing, electrical, heating, air conditioning and roof are relatively young. Listing agent is also the owner. Offers will be considered where buyer is willing to accept the home as-is and finish the small remaining items all of which could be completed after move-in. Most recent sale in the cul-de-sac was in 2022 for $105,000 and it was not updated. Items that were not done during the rehab: Paint basement stairs, probably best after moving in washer and dryer. Clean the garage, paint steps into garage. In the spring. Closet doors not installed. Some folks now don’t want closet doors. Several styles are available for those who do want them. Bi-folds with or without louvers, accordian types like the one in the hall closet, standard hinged doors, cloth hanging types, doubles on sliding tracks. Kitchen set up for gas stove. Easy install for 220v line for electric stove. Material cost is about $76. Siding could use some cleaning, possibly a power wash. In the spring. We believe the garage door opener works but is not currently connected.
